input.prompt:
You are writing narration for a short video. Return ONLY JSON with keys: script, tone.
Requirements:
- script: narration text matching roughly 20 seconds of voiceover
- script length: strictly between 46 and 58 words (target 52)
- tone: concise tone label
Story source:
Let's make an animated video of the following Bible story:

During the night, Jesus's disciples were crossing the Sea of Galilee by boat when a fierce storm arose, tossing the vessel with strong winds and waves. Jesus, who had stayed behind to pray, came to them by walking across the surface of the water. The disciples were terrified, thinking they were seeing a ghost, but Jesus called out to reassure them.
Peter, ever bold, asked Jesus to invite him out onto the water as well. Jesus did, and Peter actually stepped out of the boat and began walking toward him — until he took his eyes off Jesus, noticed the storm around him, and began to sink in fear. He cried out for help, and Jesus immediately caught him, gently rebuking him for his lack of faith.
When the two climbed back into the boat, the storm ceased at once. The disciples were awestruck and worshipped Jesus, declaring him to be the Son of God.

Let's make an animated video of the following Bible story:

During the night, Jesus's disciples were crossing the Sea of Galilee by boat when a fierce storm arose, tossing the vessel with strong winds and waves. Jesus, who had stayed behind to pray, came to them by walking across the surface of the water. The disciples were terrified, thinking they were seeing a ghost, but Jesus called out to reassure them.
Peter, ever bold, asked Jesus to invite him out onto the water as well. Jesus did, and Peter actually stepped out of the boat and began walking toward him — until he took his eyes off Jesus, noticed the storm around him, and began to sink in fear. He cried out for help, and Jesus immediately caught him, gently rebuking him for his lack of faith.
When the two climbed back into the boat, the storm ceased at once. The disciples were awestruck and worshipped Jesus, declaring him to be the Son of God.

input.text: As the disciples battled a fierce storm on the Sea of Galilee, Jesus walked toward them on the water. Terrified, they thought he was a ghost—until he spoke. Peter stepped out, walking on water too—until fear made him sink. Jesus rescued him, calming the storm. Amazed, the disciples worshipped him as the Son of God.

input.prompt:
You are writing visual keyframe prompts for a short video narration. Return ONLY JSON with key: shots.
Requirements:
- shots: array of exactly 6 short visual descriptions
- each shot: exactly one sentence, concrete and visually descriptive
- keep continuity of characters/setting across shots
- align with narration pacing and tone: dramatic
Narration:
As the disciples battled a fierce storm on the Sea of Galilee, Jesus walked toward them on the water. Terrified, they thought he was a ghost—until he spoke. Peter stepped out, walking on water too—until fear made him sink. Jesus rescued him, calming the storm. Amazed, the disciples worshipped him as the Son of God.
